endpoints.name: GET /{resourceUri}/providers/microsoft.insights/diagnosticSettings/service
endpoints.description: Gets the active diagnostic settings for the specified resource. **WARNING**: This method will be deprecated in future releases.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{RESOURCEURI}} with a real resourceuri.

endpoints.name: PUT /{resourceUri}/providers/microsoft.insights/diagnosticSettings/service
endpoints.description: Create or update new diagnostic settings for the specified resource. **WARNING**: This method will be deprecated in future releases.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{RESOURCEURI}} with a real resourceuri.
